---
title: unnecessary-format
description: "Avoid formatting calls without directives."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Avoid formatting calls without directives. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
fmt.Sprintf("static message")
```

## Good

```go
fmt.Sprint(value)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only unnecessary-format`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
